codeReview.summary: The round-2 test update fixed the prior overlap with the missing-final-review case, but VAL-CORRECT-031 is still not isolated to the requireFinalReview-specific guard. The case is now subsumed by the earlier generic failing_final_review guard.

issues.description: The updated "required final review not passing" case now provides a failing finalReview, but that condition is already consumed by the earlier generic guard at src/runtime/transitions/execution-completion-guards.ts:91-96 (`worker.finalReview && !isReviewPassing(worker.finalReview)`), before the requireFinalReview-specific guard at lines 110-113. As a result, this test still does not uniquely exercise the requireFinalReview path: removing the dedicated requireFinalReview guard would keep this case green. This leaves VAL-CORRECT-031 isolation unresolved.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Current contract phrasing for VAL-CORRECT-031 verifies output shape but not branch isolation, which allows redundant matrix cases to satisfy the assertion even when the requireFinalReview-specific guard is unproven.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:252-253 requires failing_final_review + reset command; runtime has two failing_final_review checks (src/runtime/transitions/execution-completion-guards.ts:91-96 and 110-113), and both VAL-CORRECT-028 (tests/completion-gates.test.ts:210-225) and VAL-CORRECT-031 (249-268) satisfy the earlier generic check.

summary: Fail. The fix corrected the previous missing-finalReview overlap but still does not isolate VAL-CORRECT-031 to the requireFinalReview-specific runtime guard, so the original isolation objective remains unmet.
